## Editing.FieldValidators type

Map of [field validators](./ts-chocolate.editing.ifieldvalidator.md) for an entity type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type FieldValidators<T> = {
    [key in keyof T]: IFieldValidator<T, key>;
};
```
